glass.$description: Glass surface tokens — combined frosted (backdrop-filter blur+saturate) + liquid (SVG displacement filter). Three depth levels per the existing GlassCard.stories.tsx pattern.

frostedBlurSurface.$description: Frosted blur for shallow surfaces (containers, panels)

frostedBlurRaised.$description: Frosted blur for raised cards (default GlassCard depth)

frostedBlurFloating.$description: Frosted blur for floating overlays (dialogs, modals)

frostedSaturate.$description: Color saturation boost through the frosted layer. 162% validated in /tmp/glass-demo/ on 2026-05-21.

frostedBg.$description: Frosted plate tint. 10-12% gray gives milky look without crushing legibility.

frostedBorderLight.$description: Top edge highlight border in light mode

frostedBorderDark.$description: Top edge highlight border in dark mode (reduced for contrast)

glass.$$_liquid: _____ LIQUID LAYER (SVG displacement filter) — static, no canvas regen _____

liquidDisplacementScale.$description: feDisplacementMap scale. Subtle default — set 0 to disable. Tune via mp/app/layout.tsx <GlassFilterDefs/>. Demo /tmp/glass-demo/ used scale 20 — production keeps subtler so text stays readable.

liquidFilterId.$description: SVG filter id consumed via filter: url(#glass-liquid). mp/app/layout.tsx must mount the <defs><filter id=...> matching this id.

borderRadius.$description: Glass surface radius (20-28px range) — slightly larger than standard card for the rounded-pill look from Migrim

specularColor.$description: Specular peak color at cursor position

specularMixBlend.$description: Blend mode for specular layer (overlay = pops against any bg)
